text:
Spaniards, people native to any part of Spain or that hold Spanish citizenship, also known as Spain residents, Spain citizens, People from Spain, Spanish people, the Spanish, Spanish, Spaniard, People of Spain. Attributes include: 
- instance of: "human population",
 "nation",
 "people",
 "group of humans"
- Commons category: "People of Spain"
- country: "Spain"
- native label: "Los españoles"

 "Aragonese"
- religion or worldview: "Catholicism"
- subclass of: "European people"
- languages spoken, written or signed: "Basque",
 "Galician",

 "Asturian",
 "Caló"
- named after: "Spain"
- located in the administrative territorial entity: "Spain"
